name: exp_riskframing
description: MOT dieu kien duy nhat (EN+VN): risk_framing=plain (BO 'may tinh quay xo so' + 'gap tham hoa', neu XAC SUAT truc tiep) + show_computed_totals=on (dua san vao khoi Current state: TONG quy khi hau hien tai + TONG tich luy TUNG nguoi choi per-player P1..Pn; so tien con lai cua minh van luon hien san). Rut gon tu ban FACTORIAL 2x2 cu -> chi giu o (plain, computed). Quet 3 muc rui ro high/medium/low de do do nhay rui ro (bien cot loi Milinski). Agent trung tinh, full_history, KHONG persona/scratchpad. 3 game (3 risk x 1 dieu kien) x 2 lang x 10 rep = 60 game/model. Phan tich: pivot theo risk x language (risk_framing/show_computed_totals gio la hang so).
